title: TooBee Client
description: Client side modpack for TooBee survival server and other survival servers.
body:
<details>
<summary>Simplefied Chinese 简体中文</summary>
该客户端整合包起初为为 TooBee 生存服务器提供，现在也可通用于其它生存服。

# 特点
注重于性能优化、功能辅助和体验增强，它尽可能保证一致的操作体验（如大量调整了快捷键）。

你可以自由地在其基础之上增加、删减或更新模组以满足额外需求，不过不保证兼容性。该整合包适用于包括生电和建筑玩家在内的绝大部分玩家，并提供了一些可选模组。在安装过程中如果你对这些可选资源不了解，全部取消选择。

尽可能保持资源的版本最新，作者甚至手动更新了个别未发布的模组。

# 版本

整合包分为两个版本，分别为基于 OpenGL 图形库的O版和基于 Vulkan 图形库的V版。如果你不知道怎么选，无脑OpenGL

O版能用光影以及绝大部分模组；V版不能用光影和某些模组，而且需要独立显卡，但在我的RTX3050的Linux笔记本上流畅度更高。

# 帮助
**安装后建议先阅读[官方文档](https://toobee.top/docs/client/modpack)**

囿于作者时间精力有限，整合包很多细节有待完善。如果你有任何想法或建议、或发现任何bug请直接告诉我。
</details>

TooBee Client is a modpack initially designed for TooBee survival server, and now gets published to support other survival servers.

# Features
Focusing on performance optimization, functional assistance and experience enhancement, it makes many mods work together consistently (like a mass of shortcuts are adjusted).

You are free to add, remove and upgrade any resources as you want, while compatibility is not always ensured. This modpack applies to most survival players, including those who are keen on architecture or building redstone machines/farmers, and provides some optional mods. Deselect all the optional resources if you have no idea about them.

Resources are kept as up-to-date as possible, even a few of mods which haven't been updated by their maintainers are updated and built by myself.

# Version
There are two versions: one is based on OpenGL graphics lib and the other is based on Vulkan graphics lib. If your are not sure which version to choose, just OpenGL.

Shaderpacks and almost all mods take effect on OpenGL version but not on Vulkan, and the latter needs dedicated graphics card. However, Vulkan version performes better on my Linux laptop with *NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050 Laptop*.

# Help
**Please first read [Official Docs](https://toobee.top/docs/client/modpack) file after installation.**

For author's limited time and energy, there are still many details to be worked out. Any ideas, suggestions or discovery of bugs are welcome.
